category_sources: source_facts.description says modern decompiler for Java 5 and beyond; official GitHub README describes Procyon as Java metaprogramming tools including a Java decompiler.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is procyon-decompiler; official README has a Decompiler Front-End section naming procyon-decompiler.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents Procyon and the decompiler front-end; official GitHub wiki has Decompiler API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mstrobel/procyon, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Java decompiler; official README describes Java decompiler and compiler tools, and source_facts.executables lists procyon-decompiler.
